description: neuroflow hooks — auto-format Python analysis code and warn on non-BIDS file writes

hooks.command: python3 -c "import subprocess, sys, os; f=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT_FILE_PATH',''); ext=os.path.splitext(f)[1] if f else ''; subprocess.run(['ruff','format',f],capture_output=True) if ext=='.py' and os.path.exists(f) else None"

python3 -c "import sys, os, json; data=json.load(sys.stdin); path=data.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); bids_patterns=['sub-','ses-','_eeg.','_ieeg.','_bold.','_events.','_channels.']; is_data=any(p in os.path.basename(path) for p in bids_patterns); is_wrong_loc=is_data and 'derivatives' not in path and 'sourcedata' not in path and path.count('sub-')==0; print(json.dumps({'decision':'block','reason':f'⚠️ BIDS WARNING: Writing data file {os.path.basename(path)} outside of a BIDS subject folder. Did you mean to write to sub-XX/...? Use derivatives/ for processed files.'})) if is_wrong_loc else print(json.dumps({'decision':'approve'}))"
